heading: a text to test parallel annotations.
text:
First, please Mark as 'Factual takeaway' the two sentences containing your name. For example, mark: "This is [YourName]."
 As a comment, write your first name. That is, write: "[YourName]".

This is Sheikh.
This is Abhilasha.
This is Noam.
Not Not Not Not. This is also Sheikh. Not Not Not Not.
Not Not Not Not. This is also Abhilasha. Not Not Not Not.
Not Not Not Not. This is aslo Noam. Not Not Not Not.


Next, mark the next sentence as the first point of concern.

I am a point of concern.

As takeaway write: "takeaway, [YourName]"
As question write: "question, [YourName]"
Severity: 4

For the second point of concern mark the sentence containing your name. First, please Mark as 'Factual takeaway' the two sentences containing your name. For example, mark: 'This is [YourName]'s [number] concern.'
This is Noam's 1 concern.
This is Sheikh's 3 concern.
This is Abhilasha's 5 concern.

As takeaway write: "takeaway2, [YourName]"
As question write: "question2, [YourName]"
Severity: mark according to the number appearing in your sentence. (Noam:1, Abhilasha:5, Sheikh: 3)

Good luck and thank you!
